title: soothing & immersive experience
description: Simple vanilla+ modpack aiming for an immersive experience in the beauty of minecraft
body:
**Simple immersive vanilla+ experience : 1.20.4**

To enjoy minecraft fully again, I created the soothing and immersive minecraft experience modpack.  This modpack aim for a chill ambience and magnificient visuals while bringing more life to your worlds without doing too much.

You will find ton of quality of life mods, enhanced structures, animations, ambiences and some new biomes using only vanilla blocks. Also an included shaderpack and a lot of performance mods to prevent your PC from burning.

(I still recommand having a minimally good PC if you want to play with distant horizons and the shaders tho)

Also please support the creators of these mods and shaderpacks, this is certainly a lot of work and skills that I don't have to create these, so consider to check them out. (It would be impossible without them, Huge thanks=)


_Some important mods :_

[distant horizons mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) (insane render distance)

[terralith mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) (new vanilla biomes)

[essential mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) (allow you to play with friends on a solo world, no server needed)

[ambient sounds 6 mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) (add ambient sounds)

[YUNG'S better mods page](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) (improve every vanilla structures)
The shaderpack :

 
_Shaderpack :_

[complementary unbound shader page](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound/version/latest) (truly the best shader)
Ressourcepack :

 
_Ressourcepack:_

[fresh animation ressourcepack page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), (adds cool animations to every mob and combined with the mod "villager names" it makes villagers feel much more human)
